body_txt: When it comes to romantic relationships, it is expected that someone will become familiar with their partner over time. Even if someone doesn't know every single specific detail, they are expected to be familiar with certain aspects of their partner. Sadly, this isn't always the case, with some people not knowing things about their partners they should be expected to know. Said reasons can be unsympathetic or sympathetic, and a person guilty of this trope might eventually redeem themselves by getting to know their partner better. Unsympathetic examples of this trope are often ignorant of what their lover is like because they don't really love them. Someone who's with someone for superficial reasons like money , looks , or status might not bother putting effort into knowing their lover's personality because they didn't choose them for that reason. If someone is pretending to love another as a manipulation tactic, their lack of knowledge of the one they supposedly "love" will be shown as proof that they aren't really in love. A Control Freak who wants to force their lover to conform to their tastes might not bother learning or remembering certain information about their partner because they want to change their partner to conform to their desires rather than accept them for who they are. Someone who's cheating with two or more people might mix up details between their partners. In sympathetic cases, their reasons for not knowing their lovers are less due to apathy or selfishness, but more due to either circumstances or misunderstandings. A person who's a workaholic or who has to work long hours might not have the time to get to know their partner. Someone who has poor social skills might be ignorant of their lover because of their general social ineptitude. Someone who has grown distant from their partner might not know their partner because of the amount of time since they last talked. Related to Loving a Shadow , with the key difference being that this trope requires a person to be in an actual relationship with someone, while the other also includes those who merely have crushes on someone. In addition, someone who is only Loving A Shadow has to have feelings for someone (even if said feelings are shallow), while someone who falls under this trope might not have any feelings for someone and just be using them. See also Doesn't Know Their Own Child . Compare Forgotten Anniversary . May involve a Shallow Judge of Character or No Listening Skills . Contrast Loving Details for when someone is able to name intimate details about the person they love. If you're looking for tropes where someone literally doesn't know anything about their love interest, see Blind Date and Love Letter .
